title: cheilanthes pteridioides
intro: Cheilanthes pteridioides, also known as the fern tree or rock fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cheilanthes pteridioides are said to include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Cheilanthes pteridioides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
